prose: The HOMO–LUMO gap of aniline was calculated as 5.3048177 eV using DFT with the B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in PySCF, in the gas phase (charge 0, multiplicity 1). The SCF procedure converged successfully in 9 cycles. The input geometry contained 14 atoms and was taken directly from an external molecular geometry file (`/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz`). No warnings were reported during the calculation. The result is considered trustworthy by internal integrity checks.
